data.title: ESTEVE acquires TerSera Therapeutics' Infusion Specialty Therapies Business Unit, expanding U.S. presence.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain and Deerfield, Illinois, on January 13, 2026, ESTEVE and TerSera Therapeutics LLC disclosed a deal where ESTEVE is set to procure TerSera's Infusion Specialty Therapies Business Unit (IST). This significant agreement marks a crucial step forward for both companies in their strategic growth, with ESTEVE acquiring control over the IST business unit, signifying a corner turn in both companies' future prospects.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy reports strong production with Barnes wells in Oklahoma, one well averaging 634 BOEPD.
data.description: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. has announced operational developments regarding its recent wells in the Tishomingo field in Oklahoma. Specifically, the Barnes 6-31-2H and Barnes 6-4H wells, both held at a 100% working interest, have been producing for around 30 days. The Barnes 6-31-2H well, with a 1.5-mile lateral extension, achieved an average of 634 Barrels of oil equivalent per day (BOEPD), with 529 barrels of oil per day (BOPD). The company trades under the symbols TSX: KEI and NASDAQ: KGEI.

data.title: Trident Resources reports high-grade gold intersecting 7.28 g/t Au over 15.0m and 16.69 g/t Au over 6.0m at Contact Lake Gold Project in Saskatchewan; Winter Drill Program planned.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on Jan. 13, 2026, Trident Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) announced positive diamond drill results from ten additional holes in the autumn 2025 program at the Contact Lake Project. Thirteen holes out of nineteen have been assayed so far, with results from holes CL25014 to CL25019 awaiting analysis. These holes were drilled northeast of the current underground mine area to explore lateral extensions of gold mineralization at shallow depths. The Company plans to launch a significant winter drill program shortly.

data.title: Ryan Patrick, chemical engineer, joins NewHydrogen to integrate experimental results into ThermoLoop process models.
data.description: Experienced chemical engineer to assist in incorporating experimental data into ThermoLoop process models for improved design and performance.

data.title: Immunofoco presents Phase I/IIa data of IMC002 at ASCO GI 2026 showing a durable complete response beyond one year and a 66.7% ORR in advanced gastric cancer/gastroesophageal junction.
data.description: In Shanghai on January 13, 2026, Immunofoco, a biotechnology company in the clinical phase, shared data from its Phase I/IIa trial of IMC002. This therapy utilizes VHH to target CLDN18.2 in CAR-T cells for solid tumors. Patients with advanced conditions participated in the trial, showing promising results. The study marks significant progress in advancing CAR-T therapies, with the potential to revolutionize treatment for solid tumors.

data.title: Senate CLARITY Act revision permits stablecoin rewards based on activity, not just for holding tokens, involving payments and staking.
data.description: A revised draft of the Senate's CLARITY Act proposes to permit stablecoin rewards based on activity, including payments, wallets, and staking. The draft also prohibits the payment of interest solely for holding tokens.

data.title: BookAI opens seed round financing post CES 2026 success, pioneer in cross-language Knowledge Computing, transforms global IP economy.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Las Vegas, BookAI, a leader in cross-language Knowledge Computing, revealed the launch of its Seed Round funding through SAFE notes. This announcement followed a successful exhibition at CES 2026, where BookAI demonstrated its capabilities.

data.title: Kitron ASA has registered new share capital after acquiring DeltaNordic AB, as announced on 12 Jan 2026.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Kitron ASA, a company in the stock exchange, referred to its previous announcements on November 19, 2025. These announcements pertained to Kitron's subsidiary, Kitron Holding AB, acquiring DeltaNordic AB. In a recent announcement on January 12, 2026, Kitron confirmed the completion of this transaction and the issuance of consideration shares.

data.title: Nxera Pharma will receive a US$3.6 million milestone payment from Centessa for the development of ORX142 for neurological disorders.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. disclosed that Centessa Pharmaceuticals reached a significant milestone in the early development of ORX142, an orally administered orexin receptor 2 agonist for neurological and neurodegenerative disorders. As part of their research collaboration, Centessa will pay Nxera $3.6 million, which will be reflected as revenue in Q4 FY2025. Nxera, traded as TSE 4565, acknowledged the achievement and the financial impact it will have on the company.

data.title: Agriculture version of crypto bill markup pushed to end of January. Senate Banking Committee's version on track. Boozman cites bipartisan support.
data.description: In an update, the Senate Agriculture Committee, under the leadership of Sen. John Boozman (R-AR), has decided to postpone the markup of the agriculture version of a cryptocurrency market structure bill to the last week of January. This delay aims to allow more time for bipartisan discussions and refinement before moving forward. Despite citing "meaningful progress" and constructive bipartisan talks over the weekend, the committee acknowledges the need for additional time to finalize details and garner broad support for the legislation. The bill is set to be marked up during the final week of January. The Senate Banking Committee's version of the bill is also under consideration. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
